title: Crispy Jamaican Fried Rice
description: A flavorful and crunchy twist on traditional Chinese fried rice, infused with the bold flavors of the Caribbean.

ingredients.name: Intensely crunchy
ingredients.notes: chopped scallions or chopped peanuts for garnish

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the Jamaican runner beans and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the fried rice, soy sauce, and jerk seasoning, and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Add the chopped scallions or peanuts and stir-fry for another minute, until the rice is evenly coated with the flavors.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the rice to a serving platter or individual plates.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional chopped scallions or peanuts if desired.
